name: Gb's Antipasto
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil cabbage for 3 minutes, then drain and set aside.
2. Peel pickling onions and cut cucumbers into slices. Boil green beans until tender. Set all these vegetables aside.
3. In a large pot or cauldron, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add sliced mushrooms and fry for about 5 minutes.
4. Add the boiled green beans and red peppers to the pot, stirring occasionally.
5. Simmer the mixture with the mushrooms for 10-15 minutes until all the vegetables are cooked through.
6. Stir in ketchup, remaining olive oil, pickling onions, stuffed olives, ripe olives, and any leftover tuna and anchovies.
7. Continue simmering for another 12 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
